display.purpose: Page and detail-cover titles. Fixed size — never a fluid clamp in product UI.

headline.purpose: Brand name, section headers, modal titles.

title.purpose: Widget headers, list-row primary text, button labels.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, marker tags, status pills, kbd, data units. IBM Plex Mono, wide tracking.

shadows.name: widget-rest
shadows.purpose: Default float for glass panels. Inset top highlight is mandatory (Lit-Glass Rule).

shadows.name: widget-hover
shadows.value: 0 30px 66px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 30px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) calc(20% * var(--glow)), transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.14)
shadows.purpose: Panel hover: deeper shadow + restrained accent halo.

shadows.name: active-glow
shadows.value: 0 0 18px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) calc(45% * var(--glow)), transparent)
shadows.purpose: The only glow allowed at rest — active nav pill / toggled control.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for widget lifts and state transitions (220ms).

motion.name: scene-fade
motion.purpose: Day/night theme cross-fade across the whole scene.

motion.name: toggle-spring
motion.purpose: Theme-toggle thumb overshoot — the one sanctioned spring curve, 260ms.

components.name: Primary Button (form CTA)
components.description: Full-width form call-to-action. Accent→violet gradient, near-black ink for contrast.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Conferma<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:44px; padding:0 22px; border:none; border-radius:11px; background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent,#38bdf8), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 60%, #a78bfa)); color:#03130f; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; box-shadow:0 8px 22px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 14%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.25); transition:transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 12px 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 18%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--accent,#38bdf8); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: 44px circular glass control with notification badge.
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { position:relative; display:grid; place-items:center; width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:50%; background:rgba(18,32,56,0.74); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); color:rgba(222,232,247,0.78); backdrop-filter:blur(18px); transition:border-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 42%, transparent); color:#f4f8ff; transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-icon-badge { position:absolute; top:9px; right:9px; width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:#f472b6; box-shadow:0 0 8px #f472b6; }

components.name: Navigation Pill Bar
components.description: Segmented glass pill bar; one item glows active at a time.
components.css: .ds-nav { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; padding:6px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(18,32,56,0.74); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); backdrop-filter:blur(18px); } .ds-nav-item { height:40px; padding:0 16px; border:none; background:transparent; color:rgba(186,201,224,0.52); border-radius:999px; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; transition:color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color:rgba(222,232,247,0.78); background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); } .ds-nav-item.active { color:#f4f8ff; background:linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 26%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 13%, transparent)); box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 34%, transparent), 0 0 18px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 18%, transparent); }

components.name: Search Bar
components.description: Pill glass search field with mono kbd hint; widens on focus.
components.html: ⌘K
components.css: .ds-search { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; height:44px; padding:0 18px; width:230px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(18,32,56,0.74); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); color:rgba(186,201,224,0.52); backdrop-filter:blur(18px); transition:border-color 180ms ease, width 220ms ease; } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 42%, transparent); width:270px; } .ds-search input { flex:1; border:none; background:transparent; outline:none; color:#f4f8ff; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:13.5px; } .ds-search input::placeholder { color:rgba(160,178,205,0.38); } .ds-search kbd { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color:rgba(160,178,205,0.38); }

components.name: Widget (Glass Card)
components.description: The floating glass overlay panel — the system's signature container.
components.html:
PARCHEGGI
Centro · Duomo
48 posti liberi su 120
components.css: .ds-widget { position:relative; overflow:hidden; border-radius:22px; background:linear-gradient(150deg, rgba(18,32,56,0.74), rgba(9,18,35,0.62)); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); backdrop-filter:blur(18px) saturate(135%); box-shadow:0 24px 56px rgba(0,0,0,0.42), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.10); transition:transform 220ms cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.3,1), border-color 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease; } .ds-widget:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 34%, transparent); box-shadow:0 30px 66px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 30px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 8%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.14); } .ds-widget-inner { position:relative; z-index:1; padding:14px 18px; } .ds-label { font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:9.5px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.16em; color:rgba(160,178,205,0.38); } .ds-widget-title { font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:700; color:#f4f8ff; margin-top:4px; } .ds-widget-body { font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:500; color:rgba(222,232,247,0.78); margin-top:6px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Glass filter/status pill; active state gets accent fill + ring + restrained glow.
components.css: .ds-chips { display:flex; gap:8px; } .ds-chip { padding:6px 12px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color:rgba(222,232,247,0.78); font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition:background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease; } .ds-chip:hover { color:#f4f8ff; border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 30%, transparent); } .ds-chip.active { color:#f4f8ff; background:linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 28%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 14%, transparent)); border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 34%, transparent); box-shadow:0 0 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent,#38bdf8) 20%, transparent); }

narrative.overview: Trento Live Activity is a civic command surface that shifts with the daylight over the Dolomites. By night it is a deep-navy observatory — the lit city floating below, widgets reading out parking, crowding, and activity in real time. By day it becomes Alpine daylight: a pale green-tinted canvas with the same map and panels recomposed for an outdoor-bright environment. The dual-theme system is the signature, not an afterthought. The map is the product; everything else is blurred glass lifted above it, there to inform and then get out of the way. Atmosphere exists strictly to separate layers and direct the eye to live data, never as ornament. The voice is confident and precise, the polish in service of a public service that has to be trusted.
keyCharacteristics: Map-first: floating glass overlays, never a chrome-heavy app shell.
Dual day/night theming as a first-class system, cross-faded over ~550ms.
A neon category palette (8 hues) used for meaning — crowding, category, status — not decoration.
Restrained luminosity: every glow is multiplied by --glow (0.4) so the system never tips into hype.
Two type voices only: a humanist sans for everything readable, a mono for labels and data.

rules.name: The Restrained Glow Rule
rules.body: Every accent glow is multiplied by the --glow token (default 0.4). Glow communicates live energy and active state; it is never at full strength and never decorative. If a panel glows at rest with nothing happening, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Meaning-Not-Mood Rule
rules.body: A category hue is chosen because the data is that category or crowding level — never because the layout needed some color there. Color is data.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Exactly two families: Plus Jakarta Sans for anything you read, IBM Plex Mono for anything you measure. Never introduce a third family, and never set body copy in the mono.

rules.name: The Lit-Glass Rule
rules.body: Every glass panel carries both a deep ambient drop shadow and an inset 0 1px 0 top highlight. One without the other looks like a 2014 flat card or an unlit slab.

dos: Do keep the map the hero. Overlays float; they never become a chrome-heavy app shell that buries the city.
Do gate every glow through --glow (0.4). Active/hover states earn glow; surfaces at rest do not.
Do give every glass panel both a deep ambient shadow and an inset 0 1px 0 top highlight (The Lit-Glass Rule).
Do use the neon category hues for meaning — crowding, category, status — pairing color with a label or icon so it survives color blindness.
Do maintain both a night value and a day override for every new token. The dual-theme system is the signature.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion — the ~550ms scene fade and the toggle spring must degrade to instant.
Do verify text contrast against the glass tint, not the base navy: body ≥4.5:1, large/UI ≥3:1. --text-faint is decorative-grade, never body.
donts: Don't let it look like a generic government / PA portal — no dated bureaucratic form-soup, default system widgets, or visual apology.
Don't let it become a crypto / gamer dark dashboard — no garish neon-on-black, no full-strength glow, no chart-everywhere HUD theatrics.
Don't ship a flat startup SaaS template — no hero-metric blocks, no identical icon + heading + text card grids.
Don't introduce a third font family, and never set body copy in IBM Plex Mono.
Don't use a category hue as decoration. If it isn't carrying data meaning, it doesn't belong.
Don't use a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section, or 01 / 02 / 03 numbered scaffolding, as default.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism beyond the established panel system.
